meaning: adj.鍚穻宸寸殑,娣嬪反鑵虹殑
examples: It is especially useful for increasing flow of the lymphatic system.
Lymphatic filariasis isn't limited to Guyana.
She spent much of the past year being treated for lymphatic cancer.
Kleinman-Barnett currently prescribes range-of-motion exercises, stretching, and massage to stimulate lymphatic flow in her patients.
The cancer eventually moves down lymphatic ducts to other areas of the body to other lymph nodes.
